title: Muhlenbergia × breviaristata
taxonomy: Muhlenbergia × breviaristata is a hybrid of the Muhlenbergia species. It belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. As a hybrid, it is a cross between two Muhlenbergia species, but the exact parent species are not specified in most resources. This classification places Muhlenbergia × breviaristata within the genus Muhlenbergia and the larger order Poales.
